title: Settings
pageDescription: Manage your account settings and set e-mail preferences.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: This is how others will see you on the site.
profile.usernameDescription: This is your public display name. It can be your real name or a pseudonym.
profile.usernameChangePeriod: You can only change this once every 30 days.
profile.emailSelectPlaceholder: Select a verified email to display
profile.emailDescription: You can manage verified email addresses in your email settings.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little bit about yourself
profile.bioDescription: You can @mention other users and organizations to link to them.
profile.urlsDescription: Add links to your website, blog, or social media profiles.

validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 2 characters.
validation.usernameMax: Username must not be longer than 30 characters.
validation.emailRequired: Please select an email to display.

account.title: Account
account.description: Update your account settings. Set your preferred language and timezone.
account.name: Name
account.nameDescription: This is the name that will be displayed on your profile and in emails.
account.dobDescription: Your date of birth is used to calculate your age.
account.languageDescription: This is the language that will be used in the dashboard.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.nameMax: Name must not be longer than 30 characters.
validation.dobRequired: Please select your date of birth.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the appearance of the app. Automatically switch between day and night themes.
appearance.fontDescription: Set the font you want to use in the dashboard.
appearance.themeDescription: Select the theme for the dashboard.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.communicationEmailsDesc: Receive emails about your account activity.
notifications.marketingEmailsDesc: Receive emails about new products, features, and more.
notifications.socialEmailsDesc: Receive emails for friend requests, follows, and more.
notifications.securityEmailsDesc: Receive emails about your account activity and security.
notifications.mobileSettings: Use different settings for my mobile devices
notifications.mobileSettingsDesc: You can manage your mobile notifications in the mobile settings page.

display.title: Display
display.description: Turn items on or off to control what's displayed in the app.
display.sidebarDesc: Select the items you want to display in the sidebar.
